latin: Paulus et Jessica e ruinis urbis fugerunt et in desertum vastum intraverunt. tempestas harenae magna eos paene devoravit, sed Jessica artes Bene Gesserit adhibuit ut viam inveniret. in deserto, periculosissimi vermis harenae erant — bestiae immanes quae sub terra se movebant et sonum quemlibet sequebantur. mater et filius soli in terra ignota superstites manserunt.

questions.prompt: Where did Paul and Jessica flee to?
What nearly destroyed them during their flight?
What were the sandworms attracted to?

translation: Paul and Jessica fled from the ruins of the city and entered the vast desert. A great sandstorm nearly devoured them, but Jessica used Bene Gesserit skills to find a way. In the desert, the most dangerous things were the sandworms — enormous beasts that moved beneath the earth and followed any sound. Mother and son remained alone as survivors in an unknown land.
